'''Elamm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] [[Wingriders|wingrider]], the traditional Drallish [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] and messenger service, and a member of [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] [[Sarella|Sarella's]] clan. Like most wingriders, he was smaller and shorter than a typical Drall. He had [[Color/Legends|tan]] fur, which grew longer on his head, where he braided it into elaborate curls with beads. Elamm felt most comfortable above-ground, unlike most Drall, who stayed underground whenever possible. He was also uncommonly quiet for a Drall, rarely attending [[Ta'sharr]] sessions.  Elamm [[Police officer/Legends|patrolled]] the skies mounted on his [[ibbot]] named [[Sha'lott]]. He possessed a natural affinity for animals, ibbots especially, and felt more comfortable with them than with his fellow Drall.<ref name="CCW" />
